reviews.review_description:
Dead In Your TrackZ is a fast-paced arcade shooter with great replayability. 

It is great for players new to VR and has difficulty options for experienced VR users as well. 

Each level brings an exciting new challenge with it, as well as an endless mode if you’d like to see how long you can survive.

Can’t wait for future updates!
Great little game, guns feel good to use, lots of enemies to shoot with a few variations, graphics are decent and its fun to play.. and it's cheap..bargain
